seoTitle: Barton vs Beard — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Barton and Beard. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barton and Beard.
heading: Barton vs Beard — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barton, Australian Capital Territory and Beard, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barton has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Beard (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barton or Beard safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barton has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Beard scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barton scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Beard scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barton or Beard?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
